title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US faces a disadvantage in AI infrastructure despite dominance in chips and models because China's centralized energy policy enables massive power distribution networks that support hyperscale data centers. The fragmented US regulatory structure across federal, state, and local levels slows deployment while China's Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high-voltage transmission lines provide strategic power routing advantages.
